title: GalateaHunter for Hypixel Skyblock
description: This is a Fabric mod for Hypixel Skyblock, that provides several utility features for Hunting and Galatea island. One of the key features is shard recipes.
body:
GalateaHunter is a Fabric mod for Hypixel Skyblock. It provides several utility features for Hunting and Galatea island, such as recipe calculation for shards.

## Features
* Shard recipes
  * Interactive shard recipe tree display. No more need to go to the website to find a recipe
  * Support for Instant Buy and Instant Sell prices, choose the one that suits your needs
  * The number of required shards and the cost of these shards display
  * Total coins saved (and therefore earned) display
  * The total number of times the Pure Reptile has been triggered display
  * The total number of fusions display
  * Display the recipe tree directly during crafting (makes crafting much more comfortable)
* General
  * Change language. Change the mod language between English and Russian
* Commands
  * Use ```/gh``` to open mod configuration screen
  * Use ```/ghrecipe <Optional: shard name>``` to open shard recipes screen
* _And many more cool features will be added in future releases_
